---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
df <- read.csv("gsea_results_AT2.csv")
```

```{r}
top_bottom <- df %>%
  filter(FDR.q.val < 0.05) %>%
  arrange(FDR.q.val) %>%
  group_by(NES > 0) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}

```
